summary: Full, airy matrix recording with a solid Dark Star highlight, but an otherwise ordinary show
review: The transfer sounds full, airy and well‑balanced, benefitting from a touch of audience ambience. Musically the night offers a few high points – a standout Dark Star segment and a nicely played Touch – while the rest of the set feels fairly standard and uninspired.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 4‑star rating; it praises the recording quality but calls the performance the weakest of three nights, leading to an overall average–good assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Full, airy and well‑balanced sound with a clean mix; the transfer adds some audience air to keep the vibe lively.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is fairly standard, second set builds into a Dark Star jam that turns into a 1990‑style melting‑down; overall the show feels ordinary aside from those highlights.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Gets along well with the keyboardist and joins in later for strong interplay.
band_member_comments.Keys: Bruce (keyboard) delivers great solo piano/jamming work.
